{{nihongo|'''Kamochi Jinja'''|金持神社}} is an ancient [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] in [[:en:Hino, Tottori|Hino]], [[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. Its name is regarded as auspicious.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.kanemochi-jinja.net/modules/tinyd0/ |title=Kamochi Jinja - History |publisher=Kamochi Jinja |accessdate=23 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110406023833/http://www.kanemochi-jinja.net/modules/tinyd0/ |archivedate=6 April 2011 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://yokoso.pref.tottori.jp/11.aspx?menuid=1893 |title=Kamochi Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]] |accessdate=23 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110723211557/http://yokoso.pref.tottori.jp/11.aspx?menuid=1893 |archivedate=23 July 2011 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.town.hino.tottori.jp/11.aspx?menuid=1281 |title=Kamochi Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Hino, Tottori|Hino Town]] |accessdate=23 April 2011}}</ref>

{{nihongo|'''Kamochi Jinja'''|金持神社}} is an ancient [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] in [[:en:Hino, Tottori|Hino]], [[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. Its name is regarded as auspicious.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.kanemochi-jinja.net/modules/tinyd0/ |title=Kamochi Jinja - History |publisher=Kamochi Jinja |accessdate=23 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110406023833/http://www.kanemochi-jinja.net/modules/tinyd0/ |archivedate=6 April 2011 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://yokoso.pref.tottori.jp/11.aspx?menuid=1893 |title=Kamochi Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]] |accessdate=23 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110723211557/http://yokoso.pref.tottori.jp/11.aspx?menuid=1893 |archivedate=23 July 2011 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.town.hino.tottori.jp/11.aspx?menuid=1281 |title=Kamochi Jinja |publisher=[[:en:Hino, Tottori|Hino Town]] |accessdate=23 April 2011}}</ref>
